'''dhavoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuolarization|vacuolarization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuolarization|vacuolarization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhavoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæveheth|dhæveheth]] || [[word:dhævehej|dhævehej]] || [[word:dhævehesh|dhævehesh]] || [[word:dhævehe|dhævehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavovohoth|dhavovohoth]] || [[word:dhavovohoj|dhavovohoj]] || [[word:dhavovohosh|dhavovohosh]] || [[word:dhavovoho|dhavovoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavohoth|dhavohoth]] || [[word:dhavohoj|dhavohoj]] || [[word:dhavohosh|dhavohosh]] || [[word:dhavoho|dhavoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavofhoth|dhavofhoth]] || [[word:dhavofhoj|dhavofhoj]] || [[word:dhavofhosh|dhavofhosh]] || [[word:dhavofhof|dhavofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhavohotho|dhavohotho]] || [[word:dhavohojo|dhavohojo]] || [[word:dhavohosho|dhavohosho]] || [[word:dhavohoko|dhavohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhavohoth|dhavohoth]] || [[word:dhavohoj|dhavohoj]] || [[word:dhavohosh|dhavohosh]] || [[word:dhavoho|dhavoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhavohothol|dhavohothol]] || [[word:dhavohojol|dhavohojol]] || [[word:dhavohoshol|dhavohoshol]] || [[word:dhavohokol|dhavohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhavohothotho|dhavohothotho]] || [[word:dhavohojojo|dhavohojojo]] || [[word:dhavohoshosho|dhavohoshosho]] || [[word:dhavohoko|dhavohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhavohothon|dhavohothon]] || [[word:dhavohojon|dhavohojon]] || [[word:dhavohoshon|dhavohoshon]] || [[word:dhavohokon|dhavohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhavohothoro|dhavohothoro]] || [[word:dhavohojoro|dhavohojoro]] || [[word:dhavohoshoro|dhavohoshoro]] || [[word:dhavohokoro|dhavohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
